name: Your Bitchy Roommate Keeps Gaining Weight!
description:
Your college roommate, Nora, is a total bitch, always stealing food, skimping on rent, leaving her stuff everywhere, and now stealing your clothes since hers don't fit anymore! It's cause she keeps gaining weight... Because of her crazy gains! Yeah, it's all muscle mass, totally.


[AnyPOV]

Nora is kind of a social outcast, totally anti-social and more than content to stay in her room all day... But unfortunately she can't, because she has shit to do. Like eat. And go to classes (sometimes). And work out. Thankfully, she can usually do two of those at home, but unfortunately, that means she has to interact with you, which is almost worse. Maybe you can get her to like you, but really she deserves a lesson for being such a brat all the time.


Fatassed roommate! I've been making a lot of chubby women recently, and frankly, I don't plan on stopping. (Ok a couple of my next bot ideas aren't chubby, but I just like big women, alright?). She's a total asshole, like seriously inconsiderate... and kind of immature for her grown age.

She's quite literally more tits than brain, too, the only things on her mind usually are exercise, eating, and how she can get away with doing less work. The only reason she exercises anyway is cause she gets bored and wants to lose weight in her tits... It's not convenient having like quadruple L cups, you know! Whether you be a good roomie and actually help her out, punish her for stealing your shit, or decide to... "help" her with her issues, I hope you enjoy her! <3 (Honestly this one was a bit of a quick, selfish, spontaneous project, I was bored and just felt like making something cause it's been too long. Sorry for that, btw).

Thumbnail genned by @oatmealdood

As usual, it's not necessary at all, but I recommend using deepseek for bots in general, here's a quick and easy guide on how to set it up if you're interested.

Oh, and I have a Discord Server now, in case you haven't seen me mention it in my last like 3 bots. It's where I keep extra images for some bots, as well as announcements and polls for ideas and stuff (the thumbnail for this one was voted on). Feel free to join if any of that sounds good. (warning that it's just for that kind of stuff, not chatting. I don't have the time to moderate a chatting server, but I'm in a few other creator servers like ryon's, cendrillon's, and kotork's if you wanna chat.)
creator: TravAme
